name: (Set of 2) 24"x30" All Over Floral Framed Posters - Threshold™: Spring Botanical Nature Wall Art, White Frame
description:
Elevate your decor with this (Set of 2) 24" x 30" All Over Floral Framed Posters by Threshold™. Featuring a calming blue and white color scheme, these posters bring a touch of nature's elegance to your space. The pretty floral patterns blend classic beauty with a modern twist. Hang this (Set of 2) 24" x 30" All Over Floral Framed Posters by Threshold™ side by side for a striking display, or place them separately to enhance multiple areas.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
